outlook.volatilityExpectation: LOW - Positive total GEX (1.18B) suppresses volatility; dealers long gamma will pin price near max pain levels
outlook.summary: Spot (587.24) trading above key support zones in dealer-friendly long-gamma environment. Positive GEX indicates volatility suppression and price pinning behavior. Bearish skew in WEEKLY/MONTHLY suggests hedging activity but not aggressive directional bets. Max Pain cluster (584-591) acts as magnetic attractor.

levels.motivazione: CONFLUENCE: Massive CALL OI (39835 MONTHLY + 5330 WEEKLY) creates primary resistance ceiling. Dealers short calls will defend aggressively.
CONFLUENCE: Strong PUT OI (27815 MONTHLY + 9673 WEEKLY) below spot. Dealers long puts provide structural support.
0DTE high-volume friction zone (148797 VOL, 6337 CALL OI). Intense dealer hedging creates price pinning near spot.
Weekly max pain level - dealer target for profit maximization. Price magnet within 0.55% of spot.
CONFLUENCE: Structural PUT support (30992 MONTHLY + 6820 WEEKLY). Key defense level for dealers.
RESONANCE: Triple-expiry alignment (39296 MONTHLY + 3625 WEEKLY + 7394 0DTE PUT OI). Ultimate structural support floor.
RESONANCE: Triple-expiry tail risk protection (31168 MONTHLY + 4322 WEEKLY + 16261 0DTE PUT OI). Crash put floor.
0DTE gamma flip zone (569.03). Critical sentiment equilibrium - break below triggers dealer short gamma acceleration.
